title: daucus glaber
intro: Daucus glaber, also known as smooth caraway or wild caraway, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Daucus glaber include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and cramps, as well as its use as a natural remedy for colds and fever. The herbal preparations of Daucus glaber include dried leaves, seeds, and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or used in traditional medicine.
